text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Satsuki Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon says the data from this race will
be an important indicator for the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having thoroughly prepared for the occasion, she
marches forward to take on the first of the Triple
Crown tour.
